name: 4v1 Rondo
description: Four attackers keep possession against one defender in a tight grid. Emphasise first-touch away from pressure, body shape, and quick one-touch passing. Rotate the defender every 60 seconds.

name: Cone Slalom Dribbling
description: Players dribble through a slalom of cones using both feet, focusing on close control and change of pace. Progress to head-up dribbling and a finish on the final rep.

name: Wide Channel Crossing & Finishing
description: Wingers deliver crosses from wide channels while two strikers attack near and far posts. Rotate service side and vary cross height. Track conversion rate across the session.

name: 1v1 Defending — Show & Recover
description: Defender jockeys an attacker in a channel with two mini-goals. Coach cues on angle of approach, body shape (side-on), and forcing the attacker onto their weak foot before winning the tackle.
coaching_points: Angle of approach forces attacker onto weak foot
Low centre of gravity, side-on stance
Do not commit until attacker's touch is heavy
Recovery run — track back inside the ball line

name: Freestyle Stroke Technique — Catch & Pull
description: Progressive drill set: fingertip drag, single-arm freestyle with kickboard, then full stroke. Focus on high-elbow catch, symmetrical pull, and streamlined body position.
coaching_points: High elbow catch — fingers face the bottom of the pool
Rotate from hips, not shoulders
Exhale continuously through the pull phase
Head neutral — eyes down, water at hairline

name: Kickboard Endurance Set — 8x50
description: Eight 50m kick sets with a kickboard at descending 1-4 pace. Rest is 20s at 1, 15s at 2, 10s at 3, and open turnaround on 4. Track split times and stroke rate.
coaching_points: Kick from the hip, not the knee
Ankle flexibility — feet just under the surface
Consistent tempo on every rep — descend by 1 second
Hydrate between sets

name: BEEF Shooting Form Progression
description: Stationary shooting reps at close range progressing outward. Coach checks Balance, Eyes, Elbow, Follow-through on every rep. 5 makes at each of 4 spots.
coaching_points: Balance — feet shoulder-width, shooting foot slightly forward
Eyes — target the back of the rim
Elbow — under the ball, forming an L
Follow-through — hold until the ball hits the rim

name: Stationary Ball Handling Circuit
description: 5-minute circuit of pound dribbles, crossovers, between-the-legs, and behind-the-back. Both hands, eyes up on every rep. Progress to two-ball drills for advanced groups.
coaching_points: Fingertips control the ball, not the palm
Head up on every rep
Match tempo to the coach's whistle
Both hands equal reps — no favouring the strong hand

name: Passing Diamond Progression
description: 4-station diamond passing drill. Players pass and follow to the next cone, rotating around the diamond. Progress by adding a two-touch limit, then one-touch, then a receiving turn.
coaching_points: Weight of pass appropriate to distance
Open body shape when receiving
Communicate — call for the ball early
Follow your pass with speed

name: High-Press Trigger Session
description: Tactical session — 8v6 with two GKs. Attacker triggers press on a poor first touch or back-pass to keeper. Defenders shift as a unit, staying compact and cutting passing lanes.
coaching_points: Trigger — heavy touch or back-pass
Angle press to force play sideways
Compact block — no gap between lines
Cover-shadow the nearest passing lane

name: Agility Ladder Circuit
description: Physical/warmup circuit — 6 stations with agility ladder patterns (in-in-out-out, icky shuffle, single-leg hop). Focus on foot speed, hip flexibility, and change-of-direction.
coaching_points: Stay on the balls of the feet
Arms drive matching leg rhythm
Chest up, eyes forward
Quality over speed on first 2 reps

name: Starts & Turns — Race Prep
description: Technical set combining diving-block starts, streamline underwater kicks, and open turns. 12x25 with focus on start time to 15m and turn efficiency.
coaching_points: Streamline body position off the block
5 dolphin kicks before first stroke
Turn — tuck tight, feet plant firmly
Explosive push-off from wall

name: Breaststroke Pull-out Timing
description: Focused technique set for the underwater pull-out. 8x50 breaststroke with emphasis on one pull, one dolphin kick (age-group legal), and streamline transition to first stroke cycle.
coaching_points: One legal dolphin kick during pull-out
Full glide with arms extended
Break surface with head between arms
First stroke starts before losing streamline speed

name: Pick-and-Roll 2-on-2
description: Tactical drill — ball handler + screener vs defender + help. Read the coverage (drop, switch, hedge) and make the right decision (drive, pop, roll, kick).
coaching_points: Set the screen with a wide base and stance
Read the defender before reacting
Roll hard when defender goes over the top
Pop to space when defender switches
